索引

A C D F G H I J L M N P R S T U V W 
All Classes and Interfaces|常量字段值|所有程序包

A

addApplication(Application) - 类中的方法 com.qq.recruitment.dao.JsonFileDAO
 
addJob(Job) - 类中的方法 com.qq.recruitment.dao.JsonFileDAO
 
addUser(User) - 类中的方法 com.qq.recruitment.dao.JsonFileDAO
 
AdminController - com.qq.recruitment.controller中的类
Admin dashboard controller that displays real-time statistics: application status counts, job application counts, TA workload, and accepted job lists.
AdminController() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.controller.AdminController
 
AdminController.StatRow - com.qq.recruitment.controller中的类
 
AdminController.WorkloadRow - com.qq.recruitment.controller中的类
 
AdminManagementController - com.qq.recruitment.controller中的类
Admin management controller for managing user accounts and job postings.
AdminManagementController() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.controller.AdminManagementController
 
AdminService - com.qq.recruitment.service中的类
Admin dashboard service providing aggregate statistics: application status counts, per-job application counts, TA workload, and applicant accepted jobs.
AdminService() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.service.AdminService
 
AIService - com.qq.recruitment.service中的类
AI screening service that calls the Volcengine Ark API (Doubao model) to score candidate applications 0-100 with analysis text.
AIService() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.service.AIService
 
analyzeApplication(String) - 类中的方法 com.qq.recruitment.service.AIService
Analyzes an application against the job requirements using Volcengine Ark API.
App - com.qq.recruitment中的类
JavaFX application entry point.
App() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.App
 
ApplicantController - com.qq.recruitment.controller中的类
Applicant-facing controller for browsing open jobs, applying with resume upload, and managing favorite job postings.
ApplicantController() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.controller.ApplicantController
 
Application - com.qq.recruitment.model中的类
Represents a candidate's application for a specific job, including AI match score and analysis results from the Volcengine Ark service.
Application() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.model.Application
 
Application(String, String, String) - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.model.Application
 
ApplicationService - com.qq.recruitment.service中的类
Application management service handling job applications: submission with resume upload, withdrawal, resume updates, status changes with workload tracking, and async AI analysis triggers.
ApplicationService() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.service.ApplicationService
 
apply(String, String, File) - 类中的方法 com.qq.recruitment.service.ApplicationService
 
apply(String, String, String) - 类中的方法 com.qq.recruitment.service.ApplicationService

createJob(String, String, String, String, List<String>, String) - 类中的方法 com.qq.recruitment.service.JobService
 
createJob(String, String, String, String, List<String>, String, int) - 类中的方法 com.qq.recruitment.service.JobService

DEFAULT_MAX_APPLICANTS - 类中的静态变量 com.qq.recruitment.model.Job
 
DEFAULT_MAX_WORKLOAD - 类中的静态变量 com.qq.recruitment.model.UserProfile

deleteUser(String) - 类中的方法 com.qq.recruitment.service.UserService
 

F

Favorite - com.qq.recruitment.model中的类
Tracks a user's favorite job postings for quick access.
Favorite() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.model.Favorite
 
Favorite(String, List<String>) - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.model.Favorite
 
FavoriteService - com.qq.recruitment.service中的类
Service for managing user favorite job postings: toggle favorite status and retrieve favorite jobs.
FavoriteService() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.service.FavoriteService
 
findFavoriteByUsername(String) - 类中的方法 com.qq.recruitment.dao.JsonFileDAO

findUserByUsername(String) - 类中的方法 com.qq.recruitment.dao.JsonFileDAO

J

Job - com.qq.recruitment.model中的类
Represents a job posting with title, category, requirements, and application limits.
Job() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.model.Job
 
Job(String, String, String, String, List<String>, String) - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.model.Job
 
Job(String, String, String, String, List<String>, String, int) - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.model.Job
 
JobController - com.qq.recruitment.controller中的类
Controller for the job posting form.
JobController() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.controller.JobController
 
JobService - com.qq.recruitment.service中的类
Job management service handling CRUD operations, job search with keyword relevance scoring, skill-based recommendation for applicants, capacity checks, and auto-incrementing job ID generation.
JobService() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.service.JobService
 
jobsProperty() - 类中的方法 com.qq.recruitment.controller.AdminController.WorkloadRow
 
JsonFileDAO - com.qq.recruitment.dao中的类
Monolithic data access object that reads and writes all entity types from flat JSON files.
JsonFileDAO() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.dao.JsonFileDAO
 

L

Launcher - com.qq.recruitment中的类
Thin wrapper entry point for the fat JAR.

login(String, String) - 类中的方法 com.qq.recruitment.service.UserService

Login and registration screen controller.

M

main(String[]) - 类中的静态方法 com.qq.recruitment.Launcher
 
MainController - com.qq.recruitment.controller中的类
Main application shell controller that builds the role-based sidebar navigation and manages the central content area by dynamically loading FXML views.
MainController() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.controller.MainController
 
MAX_ALLOWED_APPLICANTS - 类中的静态变量 com.qq.recruitment.model.Job
 
MAX_ALLOWED_MAX_WORKLOAD - 类中的静态变量 com.qq.recruitment.model.UserProfile
 
MyApplicationsController - com.qq.recruitment.controller中的类
Controller displaying the current user's submitted applications.
MyApplicationsController() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.controller.MyApplicationsController
 
MyFavoritesController - com.qq.recruitment.controller中的类
Controller displaying the current user's favorite job postings in a read-only table.
MyFavoritesController() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.controller.MyFavoritesController
 
MyJobsController - com.qq.recruitment.controller中的类
Teacher-facing controller for managing their own posted jobs.
MyJobsController() - 类的构造器 com.qq.recruitment.controller.MyJobsController

ProfileController - com.qq.recruitment.controller中的类
Controller for the applicant profile editing screen.

Service for retrieving and updating applicant profiles, including major, student ID, skills, bio, and max workload configuration with input validation.

Represents a system user with authentication credentials and role-based access.
